steps.title: Put the line in slope form
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation for line $r$ in the form $y=mx+b$.
$$7x-4y=10$$
$$-4y=-7x+10$$
$$y=\frac{7}{4}x-\frac{5}{2}$$

steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope. Since line $r$ has slope $\frac{7}{4}$, line $s$ also has slope $\frac{7}{4}$. The answer is D.
